dequantization_boundary.authority: provider-derived typed tcrv_rvv dequantization body/config/runtime scale facts
dequantization_boundary.source: selected tcrv.exec RVV variant -> typed tcrv_rvv product/reduction/dequantize body/config/runtime-scale facts -> RVV provider route facts -> statement plan -> emitted product, reduction, conversion, scale, and store intrinsics -> runtime-callable artifact ABI

harness.boundary: external C ABI consumer of generated header and object only
harness.dequantization_contract: signed i8 products reduce through an i32m1 vector carry, extract one post-loop scalar, multiply by the runtime scale parameter, and store only out[0] through the generated external ABI
harness.product_distinguishing_contract: multi-lane cases include mixed-sign i8 products and products outside int8 range so the oracle distinguishes true widening product-reduction from add-only, mul-only/no-seed, non-widening, and wrong sign-extension behavior
harness.product_reduction_contract: signed i8*i8 products widen to an i16 intermediate and feed an i16-to-i32 standalone reduce-add with an i32 scalar seed
harness.scalar_result_contract: only out[0] is written after runtime-scale f32 dequantization and tail/non-scalar output slots preserve sentinels
harness.source_pattern_contract: two signed int8 source patterns are executed for every runtime count and source/accumulator buffers are preserved
harness.tail_lane_contract: non-scalar output slots preserve their f32 sentinels

local_bundle_generation.realization_boundary: public selected lowering-boundary materialization consumed the pre-realized typed tcrv_rvv body before provider route construction

widening_product_reduction_boundary.empty_count_behavior: runtime loop skipped after local seed initialization; final post-loop f32 scalar store still writes out[0], and output tail sentinels are preserved
